title: taraxacum altissimum
intro: Taraxacum altissimum, also known as tall dandelion or high dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant that is native to Europe and Asia and is often used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic compounds, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin problems, and urinary tract infections. Taraxacum altissimum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits.
